mapper.sql: id, name, phone, email, department_id, position, hire_date, salary, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM employee
status = 1
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND department_id = #{departmentId}

SELECT
FROM employee WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (name, phone, email, department_id, position, hire_date, salary, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{departmentId}, #{position}, #{hireDate}, #{salary}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, department_id = #{departmentId}, position = #{position}, hire_date = #{hireDate}, salary = #{salary}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE employee SET status = 0, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
